---
title: "Exercises"
---

### Tutorials

[Tutorial: Seurat Basic scRNA-seq Workflow](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_Seurat_Basic_Workflow.qmd) — step-by-step walkthrough applied to GSE158130 (neuroblastoma SK-N-SH)

### Exercise Directions

*Link to each exercise as it is authored, using the template below.*

[Exercise Template](Exercise_Folder/Exercise_Template.qmd)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Datasets for Exercises

*Link to datasets used in exercises as they are added.*
